user_message: Can you pull the context on Fabrikam Residences? I need to draft the follow-up.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-11 16:07 EST
Subject: Re: Re: executive brief Timeline

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with executive brief. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
Date: 2024-02-03 17:21 EST
Subject: URGENT: executive brief Issue at Fabrikam Residences

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about executive brief. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Email Context Pull-Through template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct executive brief decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
